findings.description: The property table adds descriptions for `defaultLanguage` ("デフォルト言語"), `supportedLanguages` ("サポートする言語一覧（カンマ区切り）"), and `cookieMaxAge` ("CookieのMax-Age値") that have no explicit basis in the source. The source XML only provides a comment for `cookieName` ("言語を保持しているCookie名称"); the other three properties appear with values only and no descriptive text.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML comments: only `<!-- 言語を保持しているCookie名称 -->` appears before `cookieName`. No comments or descriptions exist for `defaultLanguage`, `supportedLanguages`, or `cookieMaxAge`.
